home.heroSubtitle: Built for comfort. Made to last.
home.ctaSubtitle: Browse the shop to find the surface that matches your style, or create your own unique pad.
home.customSubtitle: Upload your visual, choose the size, receive a unique pad printed for you.
home.perfText: Our mouse pads deliver superior quality, flawless finish and optimal durability. Designed for demanding users, they combine aesthetics, precision and longevity.
home.guide1Title: How to choose the best mouse pad for your setup
home.guide1P1: Your **mouse pad** choice depends mainly on your use case. For competitive players (FPS, MOBA), we recommend our [gaming mouse pads](LINK_GAMING) with a Speed or Control surface, optimized for the precision of modern optical and laser sensors.
home.guide1P2: For remote work or office use, prioritize comfort and aesthetics. Our models offer a smooth glide that reduces wrist fatigue, while dressing up your workspace with unique designs.
home.guide2Title: Why pick an XXL mouse pad (Deskmat)?
home.guide2P1: The [XXL mouse pad](LINK_XXL), also called **deskmat**, has become the new standard. Unlike the small square format, the large format (900×400 mm / 35×16 in or more) covers your entire desk.
home.guide2P2: Its advantages are numerous: it fits both your keyboard and mouse for total stability, protects the desk surface against scratches, and visually unifies your **gaming or office setup**. No more repositioning your mouse mid-game!
home.guide3Title: Durable materials, non-slip base and stitched edges
home.guide3P1: Pad quality is judged over time. All our products are designed with a **non-slip natural rubber base** that grips the desk perfectly, even during sudden movements.
home.guide3P2: The micro-woven cloth surface ensures fluid glide, while the **reinforced stitched edges** prevent fraying over time. Plus, most of our pads are water-resistant and **machine-washable**, guaranteeing perfect hygiene for your space.
